# gnr8 Agent Context

gnr8 reads service source code, builds a language-neutral API graph, and generates OpenAPI 3.1 plus
typed SDKs. The main users are coding agents and developers working inside application repositories.

## Install

Install the CLI from GitHub release assets:

```bash
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/emilwareus/gnr8/main/scripts/install.sh | bash
```

The crates.io package named `gnr8` is the Rust dependency used by generated `.gnr8/Cargo.toml` files.
The CLI release archive also includes resources required by source extractors.

## Core Workflow

```bash
gnr8 init --source go-gin --sdk go
gnr8 generate
gnr8 doctor
gnr8 check
```

Use explicit presets:

```bash
gnr8 init --source fastapi --sdk python
gnr8 init --source flask --sdk python
gnr8 init --source nestjs --sdk typescript
```

`gnr8 init` writes `.gnr8/src/main.rs` and `.gnr8/README.md`. The Rust file is the configuration.
`gnr8 generate` compiles and runs that local crate, then writes outputs declared by target stages.

## Pipeline Example

```rust
use gnr8::sdk::prelude::*;

fn main() -> std::process::ExitCode {
    gnr8::runner::run(
        Pipeline::new()
            .source(FastApi::new().inputs(["."]))
            .transform(SetBasePath::new("/api"))
            .transform(SetTitle::new("Public API"))
            .transform(ApplySecurity::api_key("ApiKeyAuth", "X-API-Key"))
            .target(OpenApi31::new().to("generated/openapi.yaml"))
            .target(PySdk::new().module("example.com/public/sdk").to("generated/sdk"))
            .post(Header::generated()),
    )
}
```

## Supported Sources

- Go + Gin: `GoGin::new().inputs(["."])`; requires `go`; recognizes Gin routes, params, JSON bodies,
  typed responses, structs, and enums.
- FastAPI: `FastApi::new().inputs(["."])`; requires `python3`; static AST only; recognizes typed params,
  Pydantic/dataclass bodies, response models, enums, literals, and unions.
- Flask: `Flask::new().inputs(["."])`; requires `python3`; typed-envelope only; untyped request/query
  surfaces become diagnostics.
- NestJS: `NestJs::new().inputs(["src"])`; requires `node` and target project `typescript`; recognizes
  controllers, decorators, DTO classes, enums, and unions; ignores swagger/zod/class-validator metadata.

## Supported Targets

- OpenAPI 3.1 YAML: `OpenApi31::new().to("openapi.yaml")`.
- Go SDK: `GoSdk::new().module("example.com/yourservice/sdk").to("sdk")`.
- Python SDK: `PySdk::new().module("example.com/yourservice/sdk").to("sdk")`.
- TypeScript SDK: `TsSdk::new().module("example.com/yourservice/sdk").to("sdk")`.

SDK outputs include `README.md` and `reference.md` with operation/schema summaries for later agents.

## Commands

- `gnr8 guide`: prints basic agent usage guidance and lists scenario guides.
- `gnr8 guide go-gin-to-python-typescript`: complex Go/Gin backend to Python and TypeScript SDKs.
- `gnr8 guide python-apis-to-python-sdk`: FastAPI or Flask backend to a Python SDK.
- `gnr8 guide nestjs-to-typescript-sdk`: NestJS backend to a TypeScript SDK.
- `gnr8 init`: scaffolds `.gnr8`.
- `gnr8 generate`: writes outputs and updates ownership manifest.
- `gnr8 check`: exits 1 if outputs are stale or user-edited.
- `gnr8 doctor`: reports initialization, source toolchain, pipeline health, diagnostics, and drift.
- `gnr8 inspect routes|schemas|graph`: inspect source facts directly.

## Recovery Rules

- Missing `.gnr8`: run `gnr8 init --source ... --sdk ...`.
- Pipeline compile error: edit `.gnr8/src/main.rs`.
- Missing toolchain: install `go`, `python3`, or `node` plus `typescript`.
- User-edited generated file: inspect the edit; use `gnr8 generate --force` only when overwriting is
  intended.
- Stale output: run `gnr8 generate`, then commit generated artifacts.

## Task-Scoped Reference

Prefer one focused Markdown page instead of loading every document:

- Start/router: `docs/agents/index.md`
- CLI: `docs/cli/commands.md`
- Pipeline and transforms: `docs/pipeline/configuration.md`, `docs/pipeline/transforms.md`
- Sources: `docs/extraction/sources.md`
- OpenAPI generation/compatibility: `docs/openapi/generation.md`, `docs/openapi/compatibility.md`
- SDK generation/compatibility: `docs/sdk/generation.md`, `docs/sdk/compatibility.md`
- Diagnostics: `docs/diagnostics/reference.md`
- Artifacts and CI: `docs/operations/artifacts-and-ci.md`
- Public Rust API: `docs/reference/public-api.md`

`docs/AGENT-USAGE.md` remains a single-page onboarding summary; `docs/USAGE.md` is the older dense
reference.
